Skill Path: Poise

Even in difficult situations your movement remains robust, deliberate and controlled.

While developing your skills in Acrobatics you chose to focus specifically on Poise, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.3G8xUlgCjRmRJNfP]{Quick Squeeze}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.CnqMJR8e9jqJR7MM]{Steady Balance}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeeze}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.3G8xUlgCjRmRJNfP]{Quick Squeeze}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.CnqMJR8e9jqJR7MM]{Steady Balance}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.5XwTj6DBX2a2q97E]{Tumbling Teamwork}
